text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The exact title "Satori-r1: Spatially anchored training with verifiable rewards for vision-language reasoning" was not found anywhere on the web. ArXiv ID 2505.19094 resolves to a different paper titled "SATORI-R1: Incentivizing Multimodal Reasoning with Spatial Grounding and Verifiable Rewards," and the cited title does not match any known paper in any academic database. The reference appears to be a hallucinated variant of the real paper at that arXiv ID, with both the title and subtitle fabricated.
LINK: NONE
